invalid_attempts.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "read-only code reviewer" --output-format json "$(cat /tmp/cp00-078-review-prompt.txt)"
invalid_attempts.reason: Sandboxed CLI could not access Claude authentication/keychain and returned Not logged in with zero input tokens; not counted as a valid pack-level review.

p3.title: Validation is self-referential anti-drift coverage rather than external functional proof
p3.finding: Policy, fixture, contract, and assembler validate mutual consistency for a metadata-only pack. This is expected for the control-plane closeout series and does not block pack closeout.
p3.recommendation: Keep evidence/adjudication explicit that CP00-078 closes metadata binding, not runtime permission behavior.

p3.title: Contract top-level audit/matched-rule arrays lacked direct test assertions
p3.finding: The contract mirror test did not directly deepEqual definition.audit_hint_fields and definition.matched_rule_capture_fields against policy.
p3.recommendation: Fixed by adding explicit deepEqual assertions in the CP00-078 contract mirror test after review.

p3.title: production_ready is metadata-closeout readiness, not runtime permission system readiness
p3.finding: The pack marks included units production_ready while preserving no-runtime/no-write flags.
p3.recommendation: No code change required; construction inspection and evidence retain the metadata-only boundary.

p3.title: Source microphase boundary should be confirmed during evidence creation
p3.finding: Reviewer asked to confirm M07 terminates at S20 and upstream CP00-077 evidence refs resolve.
p3.recommendation: Resolved by checking docs/weighted-implementation-ledger.json: RP00.P06.M07 has 20 subphases and terminates at RP00.P06.M07.S20; CP00-077 evidence refs exist in repo.

notes: Single valid CP00-078 Claude Opus 4.8 max read-only review completed with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and no P0/P1/P2 findings.
One sandbox authentication failure occurred before the valid review and is recorded as invalid_attempts; it had zero input tokens and is not counted as the pack-level review.
P3-F2 was fixed after review; P3-F1/F3/F4 were adjudicated or evidence-resolved.
